---
title: "Epistémologie et Esprit Critique <br>"
subtitle: "A hands-on Introduction to `research_design` for students of the Sciences Pour un Monde Durable (SMD) undergraduate program at Paris Sciences et Lettres (PSL) University"
slug: index
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
```

## Instructor 

{{< fa user >}} [{{< var instructor.name >}}]({{< var instructor.url >}})
 | {{< fa university >}} {{< var instructor.office >}}
 |  {{< fa envelope >}} <a href='mailto:{{< var instructor.email >}}'>{{< var instructor.email >}}</a>
 | {{< iconify fa6-brands bluesky size=1.1em title='Bluesky' >}} [Bluesky]({{< var instructor.bluesky >}})


## Schedule

```{r}
#| echo: false
schedule <- data.frame(
  a = c(" ", 
        1:15),
  b = c(
    " ",
    text_spec("Introduction to R, RStudio and Quarto", link = "01-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Data Manipulation", link = "02-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Variables, Distributions and Summary Statistics", link = "03-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Data Visualization", link = "04-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Statistical Inference", link = "05-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Statistical Power", link = "06-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Linear Regression", link = "07-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Colliders and Confounders", link = "08-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("RCTs and Validity", link = "09-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Scientific Publishing and the Replication Crisis", link = "10-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Writing a Preregistration", link = "11-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("How to Read and Present a Scientific Paper", link = "12-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Presentations Group Project", link = "13-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Meta-Analyses", link = "14-class/index.qmd"),
    text_spec("Buffer Lecture", link = "15-class/index.qmd")
  ),
  c = c(
    "Date",
    "30/01/2025",
    "06/02/25",
    "13/02/25", 
    "20/02/25", 
    "06/03/25", 
    "13/03/25", 
    "20/03/25", 
    "27/03/25", 
    "02/04/25", 
    "03/04/25", 
    "10/04/25", 
    "17/04/25", 
    "15/05/25", 
    "22/05/25", 
    "05/06/25"
  ),
  d = c(
    "Time",
    rep("10h15 - 12h15", 15)
  ),
  e = c(
    "Place*",
    rep("Salle 3", 8), 
    "Salle 5", 
    rep("Salle 3", 6) 
  )
)

# highlight the other room
schedule$e[10] <- '<span style="background-color: yellow;">Salle 5</span>'

kable(schedule, col.names = NULL, align = "lll", escape = FALSE, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(1, font_size = 17) %>%
  pack_rows("I Data Analysis", 2, 5) %>%
  pack_rows("II Statistics", 6, 8) %>%
  pack_rows("III Causal Inference", 9, 10) %>%
  pack_rows("IV Science", 11, 16) %>%
  footnote(symbol = "48 blvd Jourdan, Paris 14ème",
           symbol_title = "Note:")
  #row_spec(10, extra_css = "background-color: yellow;")


```
